sections: Order of Paduka Keberanian Laila Terbilang
first_paragraph: **The Most Exalted Order of Paduka Keberanian Laila Terbilang**[[1]](#cite_note-1) ([Malay](/wiki/Malay_language "Malay language"): *Darjah Paduka Keberanian Laila Terbilang Yang Amat Gemilang*), also translated as **The Most Exalted Order of Famous Valour**, is an [order](/wiki/Order_(decoration) "Order (decoration)") of [Brunei](/wiki/Brunei "Brunei"). It was established on 1 August 1968 by [Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Sultan_Hassanal_Bolkiah "Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah").

**The Most Exalted Order of Paduka Keberanian Laila Terbilang**[[1]](#cite_note-1) ([Malay](/wiki/Malay_language "Malay language"): *Darjah Paduka Keberanian Laila Terbilang Yang Amat Gemilang*), also translated as **The Most Exalted Order of Famous Valour**, is an [order](/wiki/Order_(decoration) "Order (decoration)") of [Brunei](/wiki/Brunei "Brunei"). It was established on 1 August 1968 by [Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Sultan_Hassanal_Bolkiah "Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah").

## Current classes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Order_of_Paduka_Keberanian_Laila_Terbilang&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Current classes")]

The three classes of appointment to the Order are, from highest grade to lowest grade:

| Class | [Post-nominal](/wiki/Post-nominal_letters "Post-nominal letters") | [Title](/wiki/Malay_styles_and_titles "Malay styles and titles") | [Ribbon bar](/wiki/Ribbon_bar "Ribbon bar") |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| First Class | DPKT | Dato Paduka Seri |  |
| Second Class | DKLT | Dato Laila |  |
| Third Class | DKT | – |  |

## Notable recipients

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Order_of_Paduka_Keberanian_Laila_Terbilang&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Notable recipients")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/22/Kebawah_Duli_Yang_Maha_Mulia_Paduka_Seri_Baginda_Sultan_and_Yang_Dipertuan_Hassanal_Bolkiah_Mu%27izzaddin_Waddau-lah.jpg/250px-Kebawah_Duli_Yang_Maha_Mulia_Paduka_Seri_Baginda_Sultan_and_Yang_Dipertuan_Hassanal_Bolkiah_Mu%27izzaddin_Waddau-lah.jpg)](/wiki/File:Kebawah_Duli_Yang_Maha_Mulia_Paduka_Seri_Baginda_Sultan_and_Yang_Dipertuan_Hassanal_Bolkiah_Mu%27izzaddin_Waddau-lah.jpg)

Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah wearing his sash, c. 1971

* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/de/Wedding_Procession_of_Abdul_Mateen_and_Anisha_Rosnah_-_53463520980.jpg/250px-Wedding_Procession_of_Abdul_Mateen_and_Anisha_Rosnah_-_53463520980.jpg)](/wiki/File:Wedding_Procession_of_Abdul_Mateen_and_Anisha_Rosnah_-_53463520980.jpg)

  Major General Haszaimi wearing his sash in 2024

  Brunei Darussalam :
  + [Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah](/wiki/Hassanal_Bolkiah "Hassanal Bolkiah")
  + [Sultan Omar Ali Saifuddien III](/wiki/Omar_Ali_Saifuddien_III "Omar Ali Saifuddien III")[[2]](#cite_note-2)
  + [Crown Prince Al-Muhtadee Billah](/wiki/Al-Muhtadee_Billah "Al-Muhtadee Billah")

  + [Mariam Abdul Aziz](/wiki/Mariam_Abdul_Aziz "Mariam Abdul Aziz")
  + [Hasrin Sabtu](/wiki/Hasrin_Sabtu "Hasrin Sabtu"), [Commissioner of Police](/wiki/Royal_Brunei_Police_Force "Royal Brunei Police Force")[[3]](#cite_note-:1-3)
  + Zainuddin Jalani, Commissioner of Police[[4]](#cite_note-4)
  + [Ya'akub Zainal](/wiki/Ya%27akub_Zainal "Ya'akub Zainal"), Commissioner of Police[[5]](#cite_note-5)
  + [Jammy Shah Al-Islam](/wiki/Jammy_Shah_Al-Islam "Jammy Shah Al-Islam"), Commissioner of Police[[6]](#cite_note-:0-6)
  + Bahrin Mohd Noor, Commissioner of Police
  + [Muhammad Irwan Hambali](/wiki/Irwan_Hambali "Irwan Hambali"), Commissioner of Police[[7]](#cite_note-7)
  + Sulaiman Alidin, Deputy Commissioner of Police[[8]](#cite_note-:122-8)
  + Brigadier General [Saifulrizal](/wiki/Saifulrizal_Abdul_Latif "Saifulrizal Abdul Latif"), Commander of the [Royal Brunei Land Force](/wiki/Royal_Brunei_Land_Force "Royal Brunei Land Force")[[8]](#cite_note-:122-8)
  + Brigadier General [Alirupendi](/wiki/Alirupendi "Alirupendi"), Chief of Staff of the Joint Forces Headquarters[[8]](#cite_note-:122-8)
  + Major General [Jaafar Abdul Aziz](/wiki/Jaafar_Abdul_Aziz "Jaafar Abdul Aziz"), [Commander of the Royal Brunei Armed Forces](/wiki/Commander_of_the_Royal_Brunei_Armed_Forces "Commander of the Royal Brunei Armed Forces")[[9]](#cite_note-9)
  + Major General [Shari Ahmad](/wiki/Shari_Ahmad "Shari Ahmad"), Commander of the Royal Brunei Armed Forces[[10]](#cite_note-:3-10)
  + Major General [Tawih Abdullah](/wiki/Mohammad_Tawih "Mohammad Tawih"), Commander of the Royal Brunei Armed Forces
  + Major General [Pengiran Aminan](/wiki/Pengiran_Aminan "Pengiran Aminan"), Commander of the Royal Brunei Armed Forces[[11]](#cite_note-:12-11)
  + Major General [Sulaiman Damit](/wiki/Sulaiman_Damit "Sulaiman Damit"), Commander of the Royal Brunei Armed Forces
  + Major General [Aminuddin Ihsan](/wiki/Aminuddin_Ihsan "Aminuddin Ihsan"), Commander of the Royal Brunei Armed Forces[[12]](#cite_note-:4-12)
  + Major General [Haszaimi Bol Hassan](/wiki/Haszaimi_Bol_Hassan "Haszaimi Bol Hassan"), Commander of the Royal Brunei Armed Forces[[8]](#cite_note-:122-8)
* Singapore :
  + Lieutenant General [Winston Choo](/wiki/Winston_Choo "Winston Choo"), [Chief of Defence Force of the Singapore Armed Forces](/wiki/Chief_of_Defence_Force_(Singapore) "Chief of Defence Force (Singapore)")
  + Lieutenant General [Ng Chee Meng](/wiki/Ng_Chee_Meng "Ng Chee Meng"), Chief of Defence Force of the Singapore Armed Forces[[13]](#cite_note-13)
  + Lieutenant General [Neo Kian Hong](/wiki/Neo_Kian_Hong "Neo Kian Hong"), Chief of Defence Force of the Singapore Armed Forces
  + Lieutenant General [Ng Yat Chung](/wiki/Ng_Yat_Chung "Ng Yat Chung"), Chief of Defence Force of the Singapore Armed Forces
  + Lieutenant General [Desmond Kuek](/wiki/Desmond_Kuek "Desmond Kuek"), Chief of Defence Force of the Singapore Armed Forces
  + Lieutenant General [Perry Lim](/wiki/Perry_Lim "Perry Lim"), Chief of Defence Force of the Singapore Armed Forces[[6]](#cite_note-:0-6)
  + Lieutenant General [Melvyn Ong](/wiki/Melvyn_Ong "Melvyn Ong"), Chief of Defence Force of the Singapore Armed Forces[[14]](#cite_note-14)
  + Vice Admiral [Aaron Beng](/wiki/Aaron_Beng "Aaron Beng"), Chief of Defence Force of the Singapore Armed Forces[[15]](#cite_note-:5-15)
* Thailand :
  + General [Songkitti Jaggabatara](/wiki/Songkitti_Jaggabatara "Songkitti Jaggabatara"), [Chief of Defence Forces](/wiki/Chief_of_Defence_Forces_(Thailand) "Chief of Defence Forces (Thailand)")
  + General [Thanchaiyan Srisuwan](/wiki/Thanchaiyan_Srisuwan "Thanchaiyan Srisuwan"), Chief of Defence Forces[[11]](#cite_note-:12-11)
  + General [Chalermpol Srisawat](/wiki/Chalermpol_Srisawat "Chalermpol Srisawat"), Chief of Defence Forces
  + General Songwit Noonpackdee, Chief of Defence Forces[[15]](#cite_note-:5-15)
* Indonesia :

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/06/Andika_Perkasa_-_53858433600.jpg/250px-Andika_Perkasa_-_53858433600.jpg)](/wiki/File:Andika_Perkasa_-_53858433600.jpg)

General Andika (middle) wearing his sash in 2024

* + General [L.B. Moerdani](/wiki/L.B._Moerdani "L.B. Moerdani"), [Commander of the Indonesian National Armed Forces](/wiki/Commander_of_the_Indonesian_National_Armed_Forces "Commander of the Indonesian National Armed Forces")
  + General [Try Sutrisno](/wiki/Try_Sutrisno "Try Sutrisno"), Commander of the Indonesian National Armed Forces

  + General [Wiranto](/wiki/Wiranto "Wiranto"), Commander of the Indonesian National Armed Forces
  + Admiral [Widodo Adi Sutjipto](/wiki/Widodo_Adi_Sutjipto "Widodo Adi Sutjipto"), Commander of the Indonesian National Armed Forces[[10]](#cite_note-:3-10)
  + General [Endriartono Sutarto](/wiki/Endriartono_Sutarto "Endriartono Sutarto"), Commander of the Indonesian National Armed Forces[[16]](#cite_note-16)
  + Air Chief Marshal [Djoko Suyanto](/wiki/Djoko_Suyanto "Djoko Suyanto"), Commander of the Indonesian National Armed Forces
  + General [Djoko Santoso](/wiki/Djoko_Santoso "Djoko Santoso"), Commander of the Indonesian National Armed Forces[[12]](#cite_note-:4-12)
  + Admiral [Agus Suhartono](/wiki/Agus_Suhartono "Agus Suhartono"), Commander of the Indonesian National Armed Forces[[3]](#cite_note-:1-3)
  + General [Moeldoko](/wiki/Moeldoko "Moeldoko"), Commander of the Indonesian National Armed Forces
  + General [Gatot Nurmantyo](/wiki/Gatot_Nurmantyo "Gatot Nurmantyo"), Commander of the Indonesian National Armed Forces
  + Police-General [Tito Karnavian](/wiki/Tito_Karnavian "Tito Karnavian"), Chief of the Indonesian National Police[[17]](#cite_note-:2-17)
  + Air Chief Marshal [Hadi Tjahjanto](/wiki/Hadi_Tjahjanto "Hadi Tjahjanto"), Commander of the Indonesian National Armed Forces[[11]](#cite_note-:12-11)
  + General [Andika Perkasa](/wiki/Andika_Perkasa "Andika Perkasa"), Commander of the Indonesian National Armed Forces[[8]](#cite_note-:122-8)
* Malaysia :
  + General Mohd Zahidi Zainuddin, [Chief of Defence Force of Malaysia](/wiki/Chief_of_Defence_Forces_(Malaysia) "Chief of Defence Forces (Malaysia)")
  + General [Abdul Aziz Zainal](/wiki/Abdul_Aziz_Zainal "Abdul Aziz Zainal"), Chief of Defence Force of Malaysia[[18]](#cite_note-18)
  + Admiral [Mohd Anwar Mohd Nor](/wiki/Mohd_Anwar_Mohd_Nor "Mohd Anwar Mohd Nor"), Chief of Defence Force of Malaysia
  + General [Zulkifeli Mohd Zin](/wiki/Zulkifeli_Mohd_Zin "Zulkifeli Mohd Zin"), Chief of Defence Force of Malaysia
  + Inspector-General Police [Khalid Abu Bakar](/wiki/Khalid_Abu_Bakar "Khalid Abu Bakar"), [Inspector-General of Police of Malaysia](/wiki/Inspector-General_of_Police_(Malaysia) "Inspector-General of Police (Malaysia)")[[6]](#cite_note-:0-6)
  + General [Raja Mohamed Affandi](/wiki/Raja_Mohamed_Affandi "Raja Mohamed Affandi"), Chief of Defence Forces of Malaysia[[17]](#cite_note-:2-17)
  + General [Zulkifli Zainal Abidin](/wiki/Zulkifli_Zainal_Abidin "Zulkifli Zainal Abidin") Chief of Defence Force of Malaysia

  + General [Azizan Ariffin](/wiki/Azizan_Ariffin "Azizan Ariffin"), Chief of Defence Forces of Malaysia[[12]](#cite_note-:4-12)
